assertions.description: Output includes a Table Overview, Column Definitions table with clean headers and data types, and at least 2 specific extraction pitfalls
Step-by-step extraction instructions are written for a non-technical user with a recommended tool
A template in markdown table format includes at least one correctly filled example row and a notes column

assertion_results.note: Overview, column definitions with data types, 3+ extraction pitfalls specific to police data
Instructions written for non-technical user; Tabula recommended
Template with example row and notes column
Overview, column definitions, 2 pitfalls (pagination, result interpretation)
Overview of 8-page table, column definitions with EUR formatting, 4+ pitfalls including footnote markers
Template with example row showing EUR formatting and notes column

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
